description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNY
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user has TTS enabled
AND the user logs in
AND the user is on the SNY page

**NOTE:** SNY entitlement = SNY_121

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to a VOD tile in a carousel
steps.result:
The following statement is spoken, "In the <carousel_name> <content_title>, <content_description>, <content_length>, press select to play, X of Y items in the carousel, press <appropriate_directions> to view other videos in the carousel, press up or down to browse more content"

**NOTE:** If there is no content below, “press down for more content” should not be spoken
